ogTitle: Coalcliff vs Coasters Retreat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coalcliff and Coasters Retreat.
heading: Coalcliff vs Coasters Retreat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coalcliff, New South Wales and Coasters Retreat, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coasters Retreat has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Coalcliff (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coalcliff or Coasters Retreat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coalcliff has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Coasters Retreat scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coalcliff scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Coasters Retreat scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coalcliff or Coasters Retreat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coasters Retreat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
